data.title: Norwegian Central Bank Governor: Higher Interest Rates Will Reduce Inflation Over Time
data.description: Norwegian Central Bank Governor stated that increasing interest rates will gradually lead to a reduction in inflation. According to Jin10, the governor emphasized the importance of maintaining higher rates to control inflationary pressures effectively. The approach aims to stabilize the economy by curbing excessive price increases, ensuring sustainable growth in the long term. The central bank's strategy reflects a commitment to achieving its inflation targets while supporting economic stability.

data.title: Indonesia's Danantara Sovereign Wealth Fund to Increase Middle East Investments Despite Regional Conflict
data.description: Indonesia's sovereign wealth fund, Danantara, is set to expand its investments in the Middle East, despite ongoing conflict in Iran, according to Chief Investment Officer Pandu Sjahrir. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting Sjahrir's commitment to pursuing opportunities in the region, which he believes holds significant potential for growth. The decision comes amid geopolitical tensions, yet Danantara remains focused on leveraging its resources to capitalize on promising investment prospects. Sjahrir emphasized the importance of strategic investments in fostering economic development and enhancing Indonesia's global financial footprint.

data.title: Sumitomo Mitsui Banking Corporation: The Bank of Japan may still raise interest rates in April.
data.description: Due to uncertainties in the Middle East, market expectations for a Bank of Japan (BOJ) interest rate hike in April are weakening. However, Sumitomo Mitsui Banking Corporation expects the BOJ to raise interest rates to 1% this month. The institution believes that a 1% rate is still slightly below the BOJ's projected neutral interest rate range—a level that is neither restrictive nor stimulative, neither contractionary nor expansionary for the economy. If the rate hike is delayed, it will be difficult to justify given that inflation is already trending downwards. It is anticipated that Japan's inflation rate will further decline as food price growth slows. (Jinshi)

data.title: AI TRENDS | Italy Grants €211 Million to Boost AI Data Center Processing
data.description: Italy has allocated a €211 million ($249 million) grant to a company aiming to enhance processing capabilities at artificial intelligence data centers. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the significance of this investment in advancing AI infrastructure. The grant is part of Italy's broader strategy to strengthen its position in the AI sector by improving data processing efficiency and capacity. This move is expected to support the development of AI technologies and applications, contributing to the country's technological growth and competitiveness in the global market.

data.title: BitMart will list Sentio (ST).
data.description: According to the official announcement, BitMart will launch Sentio (ST) on April 15th at 18:00 (UTC+8), with the ST/USDT trading pair available. Sentio is building next-generation crypto data infrastructure designed to meet the speed, scale, and complexity of modern blockchain applications. Their mission is to provide developers with the fastest, most reliable, and most flexible data tools, allowing them to focus on building the infrastructure rather than maintaining the underlying architecture.

data.title: Decentralized contract trading platform SunWuKong launches BLESS perpetual contracts
data.description: According to official social media reports, the Chinese decentralized contract trading platform Sun Wukong has now listed BLESS/USDT with a maximum leverage of 20x.

data.title: U.S. Household Consumption Growth Predicted to Slow by 2026
data.description: Generali Investments senior economist Paolo Zanghieri highlights that rising energy costs and persistent inflation are impacting American households. According to Odaily, the growth of real income has slowed, leading to weakened consumption momentum. It is anticipated that by 2026, the growth rate of household consumption in the U.S. will be only 1.7%, approximately one percentage point lower than in 2025. The primary reason for the slowdown in consumption growth is the deterioration of the labor market. Employment growth in the private sector has nearly stalled, with hiring activity at its lowest level since April 2020. The decline in resignation rates suggests that future wage growth will decelerate.

data.title: Sun Wukong Lists BLESS Perpetual Contract with 20x Leverage
data.description: Sun Wukong has introduced a new perpetual contract for BLESS, allowing traders to leverage up to 20 times. According to NS3.AI, the contract is available in the BLESS/USDT trading pair, providing investors with opportunities to engage in high-risk, high-reward trading strategies. This move is expected to attract traders looking for significant returns in the volatile cryptocurrency market.

data.title: Bitcoin Spot CVD Chart Analysis at 5:00 a.m. UTC
data.description: According to NS3.AI, the BTC/USDT spot CVD chart at 5:00 a.m. UTC provides insights into trading activity. The chart features a volume heatmap that highlights price-level trading activity, while the CVD panel categorizes buy and sell orders based on trade size. This analysis helps traders understand market dynamics and assess potential trends in Bitcoin trading.

data.title: Bitcoin(BTC) Drops Below 74,000 USDT with a 0.49% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On Apr 15, 2026, 05:33 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has dropped below 74,000 USDT and is now trading at 73,974.0625 USDT, with a narrowed 0.49% decrease in 24 hours.

data.title: Economists: Rising energy costs have eroded American household spending power
data.description: Paolo Zanghieri, senior economist at Generali Investments, points out that rising energy costs and persistent inflation are impacting American households, while real income growth has already slowed, leading to weaker consumer spending. US household consumption is projected to grow by only 1.7% in 2026, about one percentage point lower than in 2025. The main reason for the slowdown in consumption growth is the deterioration of the labor market. Private sector job growth has essentially stalled, hiring activity is at its lowest level since April 2020, and declining turnover rates foreshadow slower wage growth in the future. (Jinshi)

data.title: Hong Kong AI Application Stocks Decline as Zhipu and MINIMAX-W Experience Losses
data.description: Several stocks in Hong Kong's AI application sector have seen declines. According to Jin10, Zhipu (02513.HK) fell by over 10%, MINIMAX-W (00100.HK) dropped more than 8%, and Xunce (03317.HK) decreased by over 6%. These movements reflect a broader trend in the market as investors reassess their positions in AI-related stocks.

data.title: Bitcoin's Market Potential Could Surpass Gold, Says Bitwise CIO
data.description: Bitcoin's addressable market has the potential to exceed the approximately $34 trillion market of gold, according to Bitwise chief investment officer Matt Hougan. According to NS3.AI, Hougan suggested that if Bitcoin gains widespread use as both a currency and a store of value, it could surpass gold's market size. He highlighted Iran's proposed plan to charge a toll in cryptocurrency for passage through the Strait of Hormuz as an indication of Bitcoin's potential role as a currency.

data.title: AI-Driven Trading Strategy Leads to Rapid Account Growth
data.description:
A trader named Lana has shared her experience using AI to execute trading strategies. According to Odaily, she managed to grow her account from $100 to approximately $200,000 within a week, despite lacking prior trading experience. 

Lana explained that her strategy is primarily driven by AI, which automatically selects trending cryptocurrencies based on platform popularity, sets stop-loss orders, and executes one-way trades. Additionally, the AI generates trading content and displays earnings to increase visibility. This approach has also led to a rapid increase in followers on her social media platforms.

data.title: AI TRENDS | ASML Raises Annual Sales Forecast Amid AI Spending Surge
data.description: On April 15, ASML announced an upward revision of its annual sales forecast due to a significant increase in global spending within the artificial intelligence sector, which has boosted demand for its advanced chip manufacturing equipment. According to Jin10, ASML now expects net sales for the year to range between 36 billion euros (approximately 42.4 billion dollars) and 40 billion euros, up from the previous estimate of 34 billion euros to 39 billion euros. CEO Christophe Fouquet stated, "The growth outlook for the semiconductor industry remains positive, driven by ongoing infrastructure investments related to artificial intelligence. Our clients are accelerating their capacity expansion plans for 2026 and beyond."

data.title: Bitcoin Community Debates Proposal to Freeze Non-Quantum-Resistant BTC
data.description: A proposal within the Bitcoin community suggests freezing approximately 1.7 million BTC stored in early Pay-to-Public-Key addresses due to their lack of quantum resistance. According to NS3.AI, this initiative aims to protect these holdings from potential quantum computing threats. However, critics argue that implementing a network-level freeze could render some existing UTXOs unusable for users who have not upgraded their systems.

data.title: Potential U.S. Naval Blockade May Impact Iran's Oil Production
data.description: A potential U.S. naval blockade could compel Iran to reduce its crude oil production within two weeks, according to a report by the Financial Times. According to NS3.AI, satellite data reveals that Iran's storage tanks, which hold crude oil awaiting shipment, are over 51% full.

data.title: ASML's Q2 Revenue Forecast Falls Short of Institutional Predictions
data.description: ASML has projected its second-quarter revenue to range between 84 billion and 90 billion euros. According to Jin10, this forecast is slightly below the institutional prediction of 90.4 billion euros. The company's revenue expectations highlight a potential shortfall compared to market anticipations.

data.title: The user experimented with AI-driven trading strategies, and the account grew from $100 to a peak of approximately $200,000.
data.description: Trader Lana shared her experience using AI to execute trading strategies. She stated that, without prior trading experience, she used a model to automatically select trending cryptocurrencies and execute order placement and stop-loss strategies. Combined with content generation and management on social media platforms, she grew her account from a starting capital of $100 to a peak of approximately $200,000 within about a week. She explained that the strategy was AI-driven, including selecting targets based on platform popularity, automatically setting stop-loss orders and one-way trades, and simultaneously generating trading content and profit displays to increase engagement. Currently, her account and social media followers are also experiencing rapid growth.
